cooperation_model.summary: Revenue-sharing project; platform handles script, AI production, editing, localization, operations, distribution and project management.

image_authorization.summary: Creator authorizes project-specific use of portrait, image, voice and related personality rights. No general AI model training.

story_outline.summary: Platform provides outline options; creator selects project direction.

script_review.summary: Creator may review script for image protection concerns; platform retains final creative decision-making.

promotion_obligations.summary: Creator promotes project through social channels and publishes no fewer than five promotional content items.

tracking_link.summary: Official tracking link should be placed within three business days after release and remain accessible for at least 60 consecutive days.

revenue_share_ratio.summary: Creator receives 80% of Net Revenue under the standard agreement.

net_revenue.summary: Net Revenue is actual received and settled distributable income after listed deductions.

settlement.summary: Revenue is calculated monthly and paid within 30 business days after each settlement cycle.

payment_condition.summary: Payment obligation arises only after Party A actually receives and settles revenue.

no_guarantee.summary: No revenue, viewership, profitability, or commercial success guarantee.

revenue_verification.summary: Creator may request verification of sales data and Net Revenue once every two months.

ip_ownership.summary: Project IP and final works are owned by Party A; creator retains personality rights.

confidentiality.summary: Creator must keep scripts, project materials, contract terms, revenue and business information confidential.
